name: Cloudflare MCP
description: Official Cloudflare MCP server suite. Lets AI agents manage Workers, KV storage, D1 databases, R2 buckets, and deploy edge functions programmatically.

skills.name: Workers Deploy
skills.description: Create, update, and deploy Cloudflare Workers scripts from an AI agent via MCP

skills.name: KV Storage
skills.description: Read and write key-value pairs in Cloudflare KV namespaces with TTL support

skills.name: D1 Database
skills.description: Execute SQL queries against Cloudflare D1 SQLite databases from any MCP-compatible agent

skills.name: R2 Object Storage
skills.description: Upload, download, and list objects in Cloudflare R2 buckets via MCP tools

skills.name: Pages Deployment
skills.description: Trigger Cloudflare Pages deployments and manage project settings programmatically
